title: 공교육 학교 방문 위탁 프로그램 (학교 제휴)

all_files_exist.detail: 5/5 files found: plan.md, timeline.md, budget.md, logistics.md, partner-brief.md

timeline_has_dates.detail: 13 week markers (Week -8 through Week +5~+12) + D-Day (2026-04-24) specified with precise dates. Week format: 'Week N (YYYY-MM-DD ~ YYYY-MM-DD)'. Exceeds minimum 8 entries.

budget_sums_match.detail: 회당 비용 총계: ₩850,000 verified (300+300+120+50+20+10+50). 1일 2학급 총비용: ₩1,150,000 verified (300+450+120+100+40+10+50+80). All intermediate calculations (손익분기, 배분율) mathematically consistent.

no_placeholder_text.detail: Found 1 placeholder: partner-brief.md line 209 contains '[파트너십 확정 후 담당자 이메일 기재 / 확인: Jay @ Week -7]' — 동아이지에듀 담당자 이메일 미입력.

curriculum_alignment.detail: All 4-part structure preserved: Part 1 (관점의 전환, 20분), Part 2 (협업과 조율, 25분), Part 3 (지휘와 소통, 55분), Part 4 (성취와 비전, 20분). Time compression from 240→120분 is explicit adaptation. Core philosophy (AI 지휘 설계자, 10초 피드백 루프, 완성 결과물) unchanged.

spec_no_contradiction.detail: SPEC.md faculty (Jay, Ryan, JY), base 4시간 ₩200K/팀 B2C model, 4-part curriculum structure align with C04. Curriculum 4-part maintained. C04 adapts to 2시간 ₩400K 학교/₩1M 교육청 B2B. 2026 AI 디지털교과서 도입(SPEC §2.2) directly supports C04 timing.

cross_case_no_duplicate.detail: C04 distinctive keywords ('공교육', '학교 방문', '위탁 프로그램') absent in C01-C03 spot checks. Case focus (public school K-12 vs other contexts) unique. Estimated text overlap <20%.

partner_brief_standalone.detail: partner-brief.md contains 2 complete standalone briefs: [Section 1] 교육지원청 장학사 (program overview, curriculum alignment, brand trust, reference pitch, 2027 expansion) + [Section 2] 학교장 (program summary, decision points, school contribution, benefits, schedule). Each contains: program description, partner role, partner benefit, timeline, next step/CTA. Self-contained; no cross-references required.

budget_realistic.detail: Unit costs within market range: Instructor ₩300K/2시간=₩150K/시간 (reasonable for school context, vs SPEC ₩125K/시간 base). Adjunct ₩100K/반일 (realistic). Venue ₩0 (school-provided). Printables ₩1.4K/unit. No snacks (학교 규정). All costs align with school education economics.
